basic_details.job_title: IIM Visakhapatnam Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Manager, Associate and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Visakhapatnam (IIM Visakhapatnam) Assistant Manager, Associate and More Notification 2026 has been released on 19 June 2026 on the official website of IIM Visakhapatnam. A total of 7 vacancies have been announced through the IIM Visakhapatnam Assistant Manager, Associate and More Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years for all posts. Relaxation in upper age is applicable as per Government of India rules. The Institute may also consider age relaxation in deserving cases.

qualification.details: Academic Programs: Graduation from a recognized University/Institution for positions under Pay Levels 4, 5, 6 & 7. Post-Graduation from a recognized University/Institution for positions under Pay Level 8. Executive Education Programs: Graduation from a recognized University/Institution for positions under Pay Levels 4, 5, 6 & 7. Post-Graduation from a recognized University/Institution for positions under Pay Level 8. Career Development Services & Alumni Relations: Graduation from a recognized University/Institution for positions under Pay Levels 4, 5, 6 & 7. Post-Graduation from a recognized University/Institution for positions under Pay Level 8. Admissions Office: Graduation from a recognized University/Institution for positions under Pay Levels 4, 5, 6 & 7. Post-Graduation from a recognized University/Institution for positions under Pay Level 8.

salary_details.details: The salary will be based on the 7th CPC Pay Levels 4 to 8.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Visakhapatnam Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Visakhapatnam to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Visakhapatnam Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIM Visakhapatnam Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIM Visakhapatnam Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIM Visakhapatnam Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Academic Programs: Graduation from a recognized University/Institution for positions under Pay Levels 4, 5, 6 & 7. Post-Graduation from a recognized University/Institution for positions under Pay Level 8. Executive Education Programs: Graduation from a recognized University/Institution for positions under Pay Levels 4, 5, 6 & 7. Post-Graduation from a recognized University/Institution for positions under Pay Level 8. Career Development Services & Alumni Relations: Graduation from a recognized University/Institution for positions under Pay Levels 4, 5, 6 & 7. Post-Graduation from a recognized University/Institution for positions under Pay Level 8. Admissions Office: Graduation from a recognized University/Institution for positions under Pay Levels 4, 5, 6 & 7. Post-Graduation from a recognized University/Institution for positions under Pay Level 8.

content_sections.heading: IIM Visakhapatnam Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years for all posts. Relaxation in upper age is applicable as per Government of India rules. The Institute may also consider age relaxation in deserving cases.

content_sections.heading: IIM Visakhapatnam Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: The salary will be based on the 7th CPC Pay Levels 4 to 8.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Visakhapatnam Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Visakhapatnam to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Visakhapatnam Contract Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Contract Staff positions at IIM Visakhapatnam is 18th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Contract Staff posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Graduation from a recognized University/Institution for positions under Pay Levels 4, 5, 6 & 7. For positions under Pay Level 8, a Post-Graduation from a recognized University/Institution is required.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Contract Staff positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Contract Staff positions is 30 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for Contract Staff at IIM Visakhapatnam?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for Contract Staff (various levels) posts at IIM Visakhapatnam. These are distributed across different departments.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these Contract Staff roles?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves an Interview. A subject-matter test may also be conducted if deemed necessary by the institute.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the Contract Staff positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Contract Staff positions will be based on the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC) Pay Levels, ranging from Level 4 to Level 8.

faq.question: Q8. In which mode can candidates apply for the IIM Visakhapatnam recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to apply online for the Contract Staff positions. The application process is to be completed through the official IIM Visakhapatnam website.

faq.question: Q9. Which departments have vacancies for Contract Staff?
faq.answer: Vacancies are available in Academic Programs, Executive Education Programs, Career Development Services & Alumni Relations, and the Admissions Office.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found in the 'Important Links' section of this article. Always refer to the official website for the most accurate information.
